sources.notes: ACE2: viral receptor, low expression in A549 explains non-permissiveness. IL6: uniquely elevated in COVID-19 vs other viruses (serum proteomics). CXCL8/9/16, CCL2/8: significantly elevated in patient serum with quantitative data. MX1/STAT1: IFN-stimulated genes absent in SARS-CoV-2 low-MOI. IRF9/ICAM1/TNF: among 8 shared induced genes between SARS-CoV-2 and IAV in NHBE. TBK1: kinase for IFN-I/III, notably NOT activated (Western blot). CCL20/CXCL1-3/5/6: NHBE DEGs listed explicitly. CCL11: post-mortem lung RNA-seq. IL1B: NHBE and ferret results. IL1RN: elevated in ferrets and patient serum. ISG20/OASL: IAV IFN signature genes in trachea comparison. IFNB1/IFNL1-3: undetectable in SARS-CoV-2 (key negative finding with RNA-seq + qPCR + serum ELISA data). Excluded: GAPDH (housekeeping control only).
